bug_locations.reason: Query parsing and re-encoding ignore the canonicalize_url encoding argument and decode invalid percent sequences with UTF-8 replacement, causing the observed query encoding failures.

Path canonicalization and URL reconstruction bypass the encoding-aware safe_url_string behavior noted in the preceding comment and do not IDNA-encode the netloc, causing non-UTF8 path bytes and IDN domains to canonicalize incorrectly.

_unquotepath uses urllib.parse.unquote with its default UTF-8 decoding, which turns non-UTF8 percent escapes such as %E9 and %A3 into replacement characters instead of preserving and upper-casing them.
